description: Your unit at the WHO Global Malaria Programme has been tasked with producing a first-order transmission suitability assessment using NCEP/NCAR reanalysis climatology. Using Panoply and the climate datasets in ~/PanoplyData/, identify regions where suitable temperature and precipitation conditions overlap for July based on the briefing at ~/Desktop/who_malaria_climate_briefing.txt. Export the required temperature maps, precipitation maps, and a transmission suitability report to ~/Documents/MalariaSuitability/ as specified in the briefing.

metadata.industry: International Public Health / WHO Global Malaria Programme
